headline: MetLife (MET) Valuation Check As New Annuity Cancellation Feature Reshapes Income Mix
summary: MetLife (MET) has rolled out a new liquidity feature for its MetLife Guaranteed Income Program immediate income annuity, introducing a three year Annuity Cancellation Option with refunds and no surrender fees for defined contribution savers. See our latest analysis for MetLife. MetLife’s recent product updates arrive as momentum in the stock has been firming, with a 90 day share price return of 17.6% and a 3 year total shareholder return of 71.8% pointing to stronger sentiment after a more...
